contract_claim: The assert `row_a["id"] == row_b["id"]` (L291) enforces finding-order alignment between sides, but `decide_junk_claims` may return findings in a different order than the input (e.g., if bisect retries reorder results). If ordering is not guaranteed by `decide_junk_claims`, the assert will fire or — worse — silently compare mismatched findings if IDs happen to collide.
observed_behavior: The assert `row_a["id"] == row_b["id"]` (L291) enforces finding-order alignment between sides, but `decide_junk_claims` may return findings in a different order than the input (e.g., if bisect retries reorder results). If ordering is not guaranteed by `decide_junk_claims`, the assert will fire or — worse — silently compare mismatched findings if IDs happen to collide.
